name: Silent Study Pod
description: A quiet and distraction-free private study pod designed for deep focus, online classes, and individual productivity sessions.

name: Group Discussion Room
description: Perfect for team discussions, collaborative projects, and group assignments with a modern and comfortable setup.

name: Creative Brainstorm Hub
description: An inspiring environment built for brainstorming, creative thinking, and productive collaboration sessions.

name: Minimal Focus Room
description: A clean and minimal study space designed to help students maintain concentration and avoid distractions.

name: Premium Meeting Suite
description: Premium room equipped with modern presentation tools and comfortable seating for professional meetings.

name: Night Owl Study Room
description: Late-night friendly study room with soft lighting and peaceful surroundings for extended study sessions.

name: Exam Preparation Hall
description: Spacious and organized environment tailored for exam preparation and long-hour focused studying.

name: Executive Study Lounge
description: Luxury study lounge featuring elegant interiors, premium seating, and a calm professional atmosphere.

name: Startup Collaboration Room
description: Designed for startup teams, workshops, and productive brainstorming with flexible seating arrangements.
